'''vat챦fp챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jynx|jynx]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jynx|jynx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| vat챦fp챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦fth|vat챦fp챦fth]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦fj|vat챦fp챦fj]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦fsh|vat챦fp챦fsh]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f|vat챦fp챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:vat챦ft챦fp챦fth|vat챦ft챦fp챦fth]] || [[word:vat챦ft챦fp챦fj|vat챦ft챦fp챦fj]] || [[word:vat챦ft챦fp챦fsh|vat챦ft챦fp챦fsh]] || [[word:vat챦ft챦fp챦f|vat챦ft챦fp챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦fth|vat챦fp챦fth]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦fj|vat챦fp챦fj]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦fsh|vat챦fp챦fsh]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f|vat챦fp챦f]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f|vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f|vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f|vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f|vat챦fp챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦fn|vat챦fp챦f챦fn]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦fn|vat챦fp챦f챦fn]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦fn|vat챦fp챦f챦fn]] || [[word:vat챦fp챦f챦fn|vat챦fp챦f챦fn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
